title: Raylen Finn
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Finn}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:RaylenFinn.png]] |name=Raylen Finn |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Scouting Tasks: Save the Guard|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Raylen's my speed. I love hunting animals.''"
"''Ah, Raylen. He doesn't like space much. Just returned from Endor...mentioned some small furry creatures.|A spacer and [[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra's]] [[Inaldra's Lieutenant|Lieutenant]]|}} '''Raylen Finn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|One of the guards went to check a shipment of something that is supposed to be dangerous and hasn't returned. I'm worried about him.|Raylen Finn, to a spacer|}} Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Raylen Finn resided on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]], and worked out of the ranged combat training room. Although he did not like [[Realspace/Legends|space]] much, he visited other worlds in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] such as the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] for his hunts.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak to Inaldra's Lieutenant to Get Work|Tansarii Point Station}} [[File:Tansarii_Point_Station_Cargo_Bay_1.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Bocatts in Cargo Bay 1]] In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} Finn was supervising the inspection of cargo shipped onboard Tansarii Point Station when one the station's guard went missing. The hunter thus hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to investigate the situation. The spacer headed to the lower level of the station and found the missing guard who was injured after being attacked. The man explained that the cargo in fact contained dangerous and hungry creatures that escaped their cages and attacked him. The spacer therefore moved to the shipping bay, killed a couple of creatures and harvested their hide. The spacer eventually delivered the hides to Raylen Finn who determined that the bests were [[bocatt]]s, veracious creatures native to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. With this information, Finn was able to develop a strategy to get rid of these dangerous bests. ==Behind the scenes== Raylen Finn appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Raylen Finn was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Scouting Tasks: Save the Guard}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Finn, Raylen}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Hunters]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Tansarii Point Station residents]]
